generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. A muscular, menacing anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat with ram-like horns, sitting upon a concrete block under a dark highway bridge. Two smaller cats are chained to the base of his throne by their instincts. A baited cage with a dead chicken glows in the dark nearby. Meaning: Enslavement to greed, the shadow side of urbanization, and the traps (both physical and mental) that bind the wild.
generation.narrative: A muscular, menacing anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat with ram-like horns, sitting upon a concrete block under a dark highway bridge.
